hooks.command: cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts UserPromptSubmit hook:user-prompt-submit "pnpm run hook:user-prompt-submit"
hooks.statusMessage: 🔔 运行用户提示提交检查...

hooks.command: cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SessionStart hook:identity "pnpm run hook:identity"
hooks.statusMessage: 🔔 运行 Harness 身份报告检查...

hooks.command: cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SessionStart hook:agent-identity-check "pnpm run hook:agent-identity-check --agent-type=lead"
hooks.statusMessage: 👤 确认主智能体身份和职责...

hooks.command: cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SessionStart hook:session-start "pnpm run hook:session-start"
hooks.statusMessage: 🔔 运行 Harness 会话开始检查...

hooks.command: cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts PreToolUse hook:pre-code "pnpm run hook:pre-code"
hooks.statusMessage: 🔔 运行 Harness 编码前检查...

hooks.command: cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts PreToolUse hook:docs-norm "pnpm run hook:docs-norm {{filePath}}"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts PostToolUse hook:code-quality "pnpm run hook:code-quality"
hooks.statusMessage: 🔔 运行 Harness 代码质量检查...

hooks.command: cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts PostToolUse hook:task-archive "pnpm run hook:task-archive"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:agent-identity-check "pnpm run hook:agent-identity-check --agent-type=project-manager"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:pm-context "pnpm run hook:pm-context"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:agent-identity-check "pnpm run hook:agent-identity-check --agent-type=tech-architect"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:architect-context "pnpm run hook:architect-context"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:agent-identity-check "pnpm run hook:agent-identity-check --agent-type=backend-ts-node-dev"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:backend-security "pnpm run hook:backend-security"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:agent-identity-check "pnpm run hook:agent-identity-check --agent-type=frontend-dev"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:frontend-guidelines "pnpm run hook:frontend-guidelines"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:agent-identity-check "pnpm run hook:agent-identity-check --agent-type=code-reviewer-tester"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:review-checklist "pnpm run hook:review-checklist"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:agent-identity-check "pnpm run hook:agent-identity-check --agent-type=docs-architect"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStart hook:docs-template "pnpm run hook:docs-template"
cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SubagentStop hook:subagent-review "pnpm run hook:subagent-review"
hooks.statusMessage: 🔔 审查 subagent 工作成果...

hooks.command: cd .harness && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-hook.ts SessionEnd hook:session-end "pnpm run hook:session-end"
hooks.statusMessage: 🔔 运行 Harness 会话结束检查...
